allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(fTitle: {h[''''title'''']}\\nURL: {h[''''url'''']}\\nHN: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id={h[''''objectID'''']}\\nPoints: {h.get\(''''points'''',0\)}\\n\) for h in data.get\(''''hits'''',[]\)]")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue list --state open --limit 30 --repo TPal126/vibe-os)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue view 8 --repo TPal126/vibe-os)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue view 3 --repo TPal126/vibe-os 2>&1)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue close 8 --repo TPal126/vibe-os --comment "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Completed across phases 13-15:

- **Multi-session tabs**: Session tabs in TitleBar with tab-based switching \(Phase 13\)
- **Visual readout**: Project cards on home screen show live session status + outcome badges \(Phase 13, 16\)
- **Input-needed alerting**: Pulsing orange attention indicators on project cards, title bar badge count, and OS-level notifications via Tauri notification plugin \(Phase 15\)

All features are live in v0.3.0.
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue close 3 --repo TPal126/vibe-os --comment "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Completed across phases 13-17:

- **Context visibility**: Settings panel \(gear icon\) exposes Repos, Skills, and Token Control tabs showing exactly what context is loaded \(Phase 17\)
- **Context summary**: Composed prompt assembles System \(CLAUDE.md\) + Task + Skills + Repo context deterministically with budget enforcement
- **Session context**: Project cards show live status, outcome badges \(test counts, build status, preview URLs\), and attention state \(Phase 16\)
- **Inline cards**: Activity lines, outcome cards, decision cards render structured context directly in the conversation \(Phase 14\)

All features are live in v0.3.0.
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" issue close 15 --repo TPal126/vibe-os --comment "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Superseded by Phase 17 architecture change:

The secondary drawer \(Editor, Console, Preview, Diff\) has been replaced by:
- **Settings Panel** \(right slide-in\): 6 tabs including Files, Audit, Events
- **Editor Panel** \(bottom slide-in\): Full Monaco editor via Ctrl+Shift+C or "View Code" buttons

This issue's test scope no longer applies to the current UI. New test coverage should target SettingsPanel and EditorPanel components.
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$env:AWS_LC_SYS_NO_ASM = ""1""; $cmakePath = ""C:\\Program Files\\CMake\\bin""; if \(Test-Path $cmakePath\) { $env:Path = ""$cmakePath;"" + $env:Path }; $env:Path = ""C:\\Program Files\\NASM;"" + $env:Path; Set-Location ""C:\\Users\\Thoma\\vibe-os\\src-tauri""; cargo check 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ChildItem ""$env:APPDATA"" -Filter ""vibe*"" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA"" -Filter ""vibe*"" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ""$env:LOCALAPPDATA"" -Filter ""com.vibe*"" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName')
